users.password: STARTING FROM THE EXACT CURRENT POSE AND COMPOSITION, HAVE ALL THREE SUBJECTS PERFORM ONE PERFECTLY SYNCHRONIZED, SUBTLE HEAD BOP: GENTLY DIP THEIR HEADS DOWNWARD AND SLIGHTLY FORWARD ON THE BEAT, THEN SMOOTHLY RETURN TO THEIR ORIGINAL NEUTRAL HEAD POSITION. THE MOTION SHOULD OCCUR ONLY ONCE AND LAST ABOUT HALF A SECOND. THEIR FEET AND LEGS MUST REMAIN COMPLETELY MOTIONLESS AND FIRMLY PLANTED, AND THEIR BODIES MUST STAY IN THE EXACT SAME POSITIONS WITHIN THE FRAME. EACH PERSON MUST MAINTAIN THEIR ORIGINAL HAND AND ARM POSE THROUGHOUT (CENTER SUBJECT KEEPS ARMS FOLDED, RIGHT SUBJECT KEEPS BOTH ARMS EXTENDED, LEFT SUBJECT KEEPS THE POINTING GESTURE). ALLOW ONLY THE SLIGHTEST NATURAL SECONDARY MOTION IN THE NECK AND A BARELY PERCEPTIBLE AMOUNT IN THE SHOULDERS AND UPPER TORSO CAUSED DIRECTLY BY THE HEAD MOVEMENT. OTHERWISE, THE SUBJECTS MUST REMAIN PERFECTLY STILL. AFTER RETURNING TO THE STARTING POSE, THEY REMAIN COMPLETELY MOTIONLESS FOR THE REST OF THE SHOT. THE CAMERA MUST REMAIN PERFECTLY STATIC THROUGHOUT, WITH NO ZOOM, PAN, TILT, SHAKE, OR ANY OTHER CAMERA MOVEMENT.
